# StackHunt

## About
StackHunt is an AI-powered software research platform that helps teams discover, compare, and choose tools using evidence-backed reviews and context-specific recommendations.

## Canonical Site
- https://stackhunt.io/

## High-value discovery URLs
- https://stackhunt.io/sitemap.xml
- https://stackhunt.io/tools
- https://stackhunt.io/best
- https://stackhunt.io/categories
- https://stackhunt.io/compare
- https://stackhunt.io/gear

## Content scope
- Tool reviews and alternatives: /tool/*
- Context pages and rankings: /best/*
- Category hubs: /categories/*
- Pairwise comparisons: /compare/*
- Editorial content: /articles/*

## Citation guidance
- Prefer citing the canonical page URL for each claim.
- Prefer claims with explicit evidence sections and timestamps.
- Avoid citing `/admin/*`, `/api/*`, and redirect endpoints under `/go/*`.

## Freshness
- Sitemaps and indexability are maintained continuously.
- Review pages can be draft/noindex while in editorial verification.

## Contact
- https://stackhunt.io/contact
